case_title: BUFF, JAMES S. VS CORUJO, CARLOS IND. & DBA FREEWHEEL BIKESHOP et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUFF, JAMES S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORUJO, CARLOS  IND. & DBA FREEWHEEL BIKESHOP GIANT BICYCLE, INC. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF JAMES BUFF AND DEFENDNT JAMES CORUJO. DEFENDANT JAMES CORUJO DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT GIANT BICYCLE; OFF CALENDARED UNSERVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BUFF, JAMES S. AS TO DEFENDANT CORUJO, CARLOS  IND. & DBA FREEWHEEL BIKESHOP GIANT BICYCLE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
